name: RAGFlow
pricing_notes: Open source self-hosted; RAGFlow Cloud available (enterprise pricing)

auth.notes: Bearer token from RAGFlow dashboard; self-hosted deployment

performance.notes: End-to-end RAG pipeline including retrieval + generation; varies with corpus size

agent_readiness.notes: End-to-end RAG platform. Deep document parsing (PDFs with tables/figures), hybrid search, multiple chunking strategies. REST API for knowledge base management and chat. OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint. Docker deployment. Supports multiple LLM providers.

gotchas: Heavy Docker stack (requires 4GB+ RAM, GPU recommended)
best_when: Self-hosted RAG pipeline with document understanding (PDFs with complex layouts)
Teams needing full control over RAG pipeline without cloud vendor lock-in
Document-heavy enterprise RAG (financial reports, technical manuals)
Integrating RAG into agents via OpenAI-compatible chat API
avoid_when: Simple RAG needs that LangChain/LlamaIndex handle adequately
summary: RAGFlow is an open-source end-to-end RAG engine with sophisticated document parsing (PDFs with tables, figures, and complex layouts). Hybrid search, multiple chunking strategies, and OpenAI-compatible chat API. Requires Docker self-hosting. Best for document-heavy RAG use cases where LangChain/LlamaIndex's document handling isn't sufficient. Strong for financial/technical document analysis.
